content.description:
A clickable button for use in app-pages.

The `code` field is JavaScript executed on click with `api` and `pageContext` in scope. Use `pageContext.getState(key)` to read shared state from other widgets.

### Content Fields

- `label` (string) - Button text
- `variant` (string) - Visual style: `primary`, `secondary`, or `danger` (default: `secondary`)
- `code` (string) - JavaScript to execute on click (has `api`, `pageContext` in scope)
